issues.description: Trigger should be 'Trigger' (generic/activated effect), not 'OnAttacked'. The card says 'When a Character is removed from the field by your effect' — this is a conditional trigger for character removal, not a direct attack response.
Condition is 'Always' but should include 'HasCardOnBoard' to check if opponent has 5+ cards in hand. The condition 'if your opponent has 5 or more cards in their hand' is missing entirely.

Action is 'ForceDiscard' but the card text says opponent 'places 1 card from their hand at the bottom of their deck' — this is deck-shuffling behavior, not discard. ForceDiscard implies trash. The correct action should represent returning to deck bottom, which is not a standard action in this DSL. Closest approximation would require custom handling or clarification.
Missing '[Your Turn]' duration constraint. The text begins '[Your Turn]' which means this effect only applies during your turn, requiring duration:'DuringYourTurn'.
Missing '[Once Per Turn]' constraint. The card specifies '[Once Per Turn]' limiting activation frequency.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When a Character is removed from the field by your effect, if your opponent has 5 or more cards in their hand, your opponent places 1 card from their hand at the bottom of their deck. Then, rest this Character.
